description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the openjdk:15-jdk Docker image, caches the .gradle wrapper and caches directories, and defines a before_script that sets GRADLE_USER_HOME to the .gradle folder and VERSION to a UTC date string derived from the commit timestamp. Define two stages: build and publish. In the build stage add a gradle job that runs ./gradlew --no-daemon -Pversion=${VERSION} clean build, and always publishes the ./server/build/libs/*.jar files, the test reports and the JaCoCo HTML reports as artifacts that expire in one week. In the publish stage add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, creates a .public/jacoco directory, copies the JaCoCo HTML reports and the built JAR into .public, generates an index.html by replacing ARTIFACT_NAME with the JAR filename, moves .public to public, and publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
